label: Dev-Hour Equivalent: Light Debug
description: Fix a small bug with minimal context; includes quick diagnosis + patch + unit test.

label: Dev-Hour Equivalent: Medium Feature
description: Implement a medium feature across multiple files with validation and tests.

label: Dev-Hour Equivalent: Large Refactor
description: Refactor multiple modules with structure changes and regression tests.

label: Dev-Hour Equivalent: Long-Context Review
description: Review a large codebase slice (long context) and propose changes with patch notes.
